creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The 1.11.0 is out, would you like update?
https://tools.netsa.cert.org/super_mediator1/download.html

Now this port broken because can't build with MySQL8 (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/net-mgmt/super_mediator?id=d757d5292b7e413356381c09ce0abb09f402e184) - maybe the newer version can built.
